title: Intensely Bitter Chinese Tofu Mapo Tofu
description: A bitter and tender Hunan dish featuring lemongrass, perfect for a date night, made with sous-vide and ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients in the form of mapo-tofu.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, combine lemongrass, Sichuan peppercorns, fermented bean paste, garlic, and ginger, and blend into a smooth paste.
Cut the tofu into small cubes and place them in a sous-vide bag with the blended paste and bitter melon.
Seal the bag and cook in the sous-vide machine for 2 hours.
Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Remove the tofu from the sous-vide bag and add it to the wok, stirring constantly for 2 minutes.
Add the chopped scallions to the wok and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt to taste, then serve immediately.
